## Contributor Vetting (required before merge)

> See `ONBOARDING.md` §1 and `MAINTAINERS.md` for the full process. **Do not** paste references, contact info, or photos into this PR — send them privately.

- [ ] I have submitted **3 professional references**, one for each of my **3 most recent jobs**, all of which were **completed within the last 6 months**.
- [ ] I have submitted **project photos for each of those 3 jobs** (minimum 3 photos per job, 9 total) with captions and before/after where applicable.
- [ ] I sent the above to the private channel listed in `MAINTAINERS.md` and did **not** post any of it publicly.
- [ ] If I am a returning contributor, my prior vetting is still current (within 6 months) — otherwise I have re-submitted.

**Maintainer use only:**
- [ ] References contacted and verified
- [ ] Project photos reviewed
- [ ] Vetting approved → PR marked ready for review

---

## PR Checklist
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main` (rebased, not merged)
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and imperative
- [ ] CI passes (lint, type-check, tests, build)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new behavior
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md`, in-app copy, etc.) where relevant
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or production data committed
- [ ] Lovable preview verified (for changes affecting Lovable-synced surfaces)

## Code of Conduct
- [ ] I agree to follow the project's Code of Conduct (`ONBOARDING.md` §2).
